name: Emerald's Wheelchair Transport
recent_news: California LLC formed April 2, 2024; principal Esmeralda Nieves at 346 Ferrara Way, Vista CA; no evidence of school-district contracting.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Brand-new (2024) 2-person wheelchair/NEMT micro-operator with no school-bus or SPED district contracts identified. Out of scope for Summit tuck-in.

name: Mr Jupiter Desphy Special
recent_news: No web footprint located beyond directory listing at 10365 NW Lee St, Portland; no Oregon SOS or NEMT permit record surfaced under this exact name.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Appears to be a sole-prop/2-employee personal-transport operation, almost certainly NEMT rather than a contracted school-bus operator. Too small and outside scope.

name: Silicon Valley Non-Emergency
recent_news: Operates as Silicon Valley Non-Emergency Med Transport (SVNEMT-LLC), NPI #1275280695, taxonomy 'Non-Emergency Medical Transport (Van)'; based at 4975 Mack Rd #284, Sacramento.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Pure NEMT van operator registered under Medicaid taxonomy; no school-bus or SPED district contracting. Outside Summit's school-transport remit.

name: Dover Wheelchair Transport LLC
recent_news: NH domestic LLC registered Nov 17, 2018; in Good Standing per NH company registry; no evidence of contracting with Dover School District (district uses Seacoast Learning Collaborative for SPED transport).
fit_notes: Not a fit. Micro wheelchair/NEMT LLC with no identifiable school-district business; Dover SPED routes are handled by Seacoast Learning Collaborative. Not a Summit tuck-in target.

name: Global Concierge Svc LLC
recent_news: No verifiable web footprint at 3950 Stonyrun Dr, Louisville KY 40220; unrelated Louisville operator 'Trinity Concierge Global' is a luxury black-car service, not this entity.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Name and 2-employee profile suggest a livery/concierge or NEMT micro-operation, not a school-bus contractor; no Kentucky school-district contracting identified. Out of scope.
